description: v0.57 TileReg namespace. B.ITP and B.OTA encode an 8-bit architectural tile register id. TZERO is source-only and ordinary ids 0x01..0xff are dynamically allocated tiles with descriptor metadata.
source_size_rule: Source TileReg size is not repeated in B.ITP. Hardware reads source allocation metadata from the TileReg rename/allocation table.
tzero_rule: TZERO reads as a zero/null tile. It may pad unused source slots. Any reuse bit associated with TZERO must be zero. TZERO is illegal as a destination.
